TRANSFORM.selectionScreenPrompt: Select cards to [gold]Transform[/gold] (only transformable cards are shown).
ELEMENT.title: Element
ELEMENT.description:
Divided into: Gold, Wood, Water, Fire, Earth, Sun, Lunar.
Playing a card with a corresponding [gold]Element[/gold] grants that many [gold]Elements[/gold] equal to its Energy cost (minimum 1). At the end of your turn, decrease by [blue]1[/blue].
[gold]Right-click[/gold] a Patchouli card to [gold]Exhaust[/gold] the same [gold]Element[/gold] to [red]Enhance[/red] it (each point increases all numbers by [blue]1[/blue]), or [gold]Exhaust[/gold] different [gold]Elements[/gold] to [purple]Transform[/purple] the card into a Spell Card.
GOLD.title: [gold]Gold[/gold]
WOOD.title: [green]Wood[/green]
WATER.title: [blue]Water[/blue]
FIRE.title: [red]Fire[/red]
DIRT.title: [brown]Earth[/brown]
SUN.title: [orange]Sun[/orange]
LUNAR.title: [purple]Lunar[/purple]
